corrected_fields.summary: This source is a Federal Reserve navigation page listing policy tool categories without providing substantive content or details. The page requires JavaScript to display actual information and contains only a list of policy tool names. No specific facts, data, or analysis about monetary policy implementation are present in the body text.
corrected_fields.why_it_matters: This page has no research value as it contains no substantive information. It is a navigation index that links to other pages where policy tool details would presumably be found.
